title: Lovely Crusty American Cheese Flatbread
description: A crowd-pleasing, vegan-friendly American dish featuring crusty bread and a cheese pull, perfect for a snack or light meal. This floral-inspired flatbread is boiled and then baked to create a crispy crust.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add the melted vegan butter and water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a large rectangle.
Sprinkle the vegan american cheese shreds and chopped rosemary leaves evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the dough over the filling to create a crust.
Place the flatbread in a large pot of boiling water for 30 seconds on each side.
Remove the flatbread from the water and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the flatbread in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until it is golden brown and crispy.
